---
title: "Making Your Insights Global: The Power of Dashboard Translation"
description: "In this session, we will explore how translating dashboards can broaden your impact and help your data reach a global audience, sharing practical ways to make visualizations more accessible"
author: "Flavio Matos"
date: "February 29 2024"
categories: [Tableau, Acessibility, Best Practices]
event: "TUG London, London - UK"
image: cover_image.png
format: html
---

## About the event

Join me at [TUG London](https://usergroups.tableau.com/events/details/tableau-london-tableau-user-group-presents-london-tug-february-2024/) to explore methods of translating dashboards to broaden your impact and connect with a diverse audience. Let your data speak to a global audience and gain insights into making your visualizations more accessible.

In this session, we'll have a quick Tableau demo to get you started on the path to effective dashboard translation.
